shortCompanyReason: Leading outdoor kart racing venue in the Midlands
shortRoleReason: Manage and maintain kart fleets and workshop operations
companySummary: Daytona Motorsport operates Daytona Tamworth, a 1,000-metre outdoor kart racing venue hosting competitive races, corporate events, and family karting experiences.
roleSummary: Responsible for managing the workshop, supervising kart fleet maintenance, overseeing engineering staff, and ensuring safety and performance standards are met.
headlineAttraction: Lead the workshop at a premier outdoor karting venue
rolePurpose: Ensure safe, efficient and well-maintained kart fleets through effective workshop management.
advertSummary: Daytona Motorsport seeks a Head Mechanic / Workshop Manager to oversee kart fleet maintenance, manage workshop operations, supervise the engineering team, and ensure health and safety compliance at its Tamworth outdoor karting venue. Full-time with flexible hours including evenings and weekends, paying from £32,000 per year.
coreResponsibilities: Order and manage stock and spares
Ensure health and safety compliance in workshop
essentialRequirements: Understanding of health and safety requirements
Experience maintaining stock and budget control
preferredRequirements: Knowledge of Sodikart, Birel, Biz, CRG
Clean or near clean driving licence

personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I am an experienced operations and transformation leader with a track record in leisure and manufacturing environments. I am excited by the opportunity to combine my hands-on operational leadership with my mechanical and team management skills to lead the Daytona Tamworth workshop.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: Daytona Motorsport’s reputation as the Midlands’ premier outdoor karting venue makes it an appealing environment for me to apply my operational and engineering management experience. I value the focus on high-quality racing experiences and the pride in well-maintained kart fleets.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role aligns with my experience in managing complex operations, leading teams, and maintaining disciplined standards in fast-moving environments. My background in leisure operations at Alton Towers and manufacturing at Copper Alloys equips me to manage the workshop, supervise teams and ensure performance and safety.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Demonstrates my ability to lead live operations and large teams in a leisure environment.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Led operations and teams of 300+ across major attraction launches at Alton Towers.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Shows my hands-on experience in mechanical settings and improving operational performance.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Improved processes and equipment usage in a precision manufacturing environment, boosting gross margin from 29% to 39%.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring operational leadership, team management and mechanical insight that directly support this workshop manager role. My career spans mechanical processes, live leisure operations and structured safety compliance.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: I will maintain and improve kart fleet performance, lead the workshop team safely and efficiently, and manage stock and budgets to keep the operation running smoothly.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I thrive in team-focused, hands-on roles where accountability and high standards are essential.
personalisedContent.closingSummary: I look forward to bringing my operational leadership and workshop management experience to Daytona Tamworth.
contentNotes: Company detail in advert is limited
